creator: tuexen@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gordon Bergling from comment #16)
Can you update to the latest sources? The LRO code has changed recently...

I think the problem is related which part is entering the network epoch and which part is expecting that it is already done...

Can't test myself, since I don't have a Windows system and Hyper-V requires one. Or am I wrong?
